properties.description: Base concept for account-like records with common identifiers and status fields.

Market value after haircut for regulatory eligible collateral reporting.
Regulator requires daily account-level eligible collateral details.

reporting_grain.description: One row per collateral valuation used for eligible collateral reporting.

MarginAccount inherits value concept account_id (AccountIdentifier) from AccountData.
MarginAccount inherits value concept account_status (StatusCode) from AccountData.
Both fields use ValueType concept AccountIdentifier.
Both fields use ValueType concept StatusCode.
Both fields use ValueType concept CurrencyCode.
Both fields use ValueType concept CountryCode.
Both fields use ValueType concept MonetaryAmount.
MarginAccount.account_id maps to physical field margin_accounts.account_id.
MarginAccount.account_status maps to physical field margin_accounts.account_status.
MarginAccount.base_currency maps to physical field margin_accounts.base_currency.
Counterparty.counterparty_id maps to physical field counterparties.counterparty_id.
Counterparty.domicile_country maps to physical field counterparties.domicile_country.
Counterparty.legal_name maps to physical field counterparties.legal_name.
Counterparty.regulatory_segment maps to physical field counterparties.regulatory_segment.
CollateralAsset.asset_type maps to physical field collateral_positions.asset_type.
CollateralAsset.collateral_id maps to physical field collateral_positions.collateral_id.
CollateralAsset.currency maps to physical field collateral_positions.currency.
CollateralAsset.issuer_country maps to physical field collateral_positions.issuer_country.
CollateralValuation.haircut_rate maps to physical field collateral_valuations.haircut_rate.
CollateralValuation.valuation_date maps to physical field collateral_valuations.valuation_date.
CollateralValuation.valuation_id maps to physical field collateral_valuations.valuation_id.
